reviews.review_title: Every believer should have this now!!!
reviews.review_description: This is an amazing app game I spend alot of time on here in awe gazing, it says locations aren;t exact replicas of the real life and that's okay becayse it matches the biblical passages. I actually spend time on there praying in my heart.

I was so excited when I saw a "bible" game and quickly got my cc out to buy. I was disappointed! I'm new at VR and I didn't realize this app game has only been on here for aprox 2 weeks. Maybe I will come back in a year and check it out again. Because I know that developing games costs money, I'm going to have faith in the developer that this improves mthly as stated. God bless you and keep you.
